items.name: mysterious picture 1
items.desc:
The clear picture shows a small child with a blonde hair smiling happily. 
After careful examining it, you see two small wings sticking out from his back. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: "Huz".

items.name: mysterious picture 2
items.desc:
A picture of an old man with long white beard. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: "Qing"

items.name: mysterious picture 3
items.desc:
An picture of a middle-aged man with slanted eyes and plump body. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: "Bhu"

items.name: mysterious picture 4
items.desc:
A woman with a two long swords can be spotted in the picture. 
Her back has a huge turtle tattoo, resembling the logo of the assassin earlier. 
In the bottom right of the picture, there is a text: "Xuan"

items.name: king picture
items.desc:
The picture portrays the current ruler of the empire, which is also your father, King Iotate. 
His long gray hair with slanted red eyes symbolizes a bold, descisive, and ambitious person.

items.name: princess picture
items.desc:
A sincere yet insecure smile can be seen from your older sister's portrait, Princess Unnudh. 
Her brown eyes with eyeglasses and her two braided brown hair made you reminisence the time when she has not gone missing.

items.name: duke picture
items.desc:
The picture shows an one-eyed man with tiger fur jacket and cigarette, Duke Inqigo. 
This is your uncle, a carefree person that roams freely without a permanent place to settle. 
You only met him once when you were small.

items.name: prince picture
items.desc:
A portrait of yourself, Prince Otuwa. 
A young man with blonde hair and heterochromatic eyes of red and green.

items.name: black pearl
items.desc:
An omnious looking pearl with green aura from its within. 
This seems the pearl that your father told you to get.

items.name: long sword
items.desc:
A long sword with black gem on its hilt. 
You recall that you usually train with this sword when you were little.

items.name: black key
items.desc:
A mysterious key that you have never seen. 
Maybe it will be useful to unlock a certain room.

items.name: flashlight
items.desc: A small flashlight that still has a lot of battery and can be used to expose UV fields.

items.name: lighter
items.desc: A small lighter that can be used to ignite something.

items.name: old note
items.desc:
The note states a long history of a war between two factions. 
You immediately recognize the two factions: the assassin and your father. 
The old man is in the opposite faction, so why did he treat you well?

items.name: spell book
items.desc: A simple spell book. You can use the book to level up your stats.

items.name: cutter
items.desc: A sharp small cutter. Perhaps you can use it to open something.

items.name: magic crystal
items.desc: Crystal that is imbued with a magic.
